description: Style NoteCut from soft and stretchy blended cotton, these basics briefs are definitely a comfortable daily-wear choice. These have a broad and stretchable branded waistband that sits snugly on your hip while the shaped-to-Fit double layered contoured pouch guarantees complete contentment. Product Details Black, mid rise briefs, wide elasticized waistband with branding in blue, u-seam with double layered front pouchMaterial and Care95% cotton and 5% elastaneMachine wash coldUse only non-chlorine bleachTumble dry low heatDo not dry clean or ironFit and SizeMid RiseThe model (height 6' waist 32'') is wearing a size M
